chemistry_overall: Candidates 2 and 3 have hard-gate failures for insufficient conversion and mixing issues. Candidates 1 and 4 are viable with moderate conversions. Candidates 5 and 7 are viable with good mixing but suboptimal conversion. Candidate 13 exceeds bench length limits while candidate 6 has dual mixing failures and insufficient conversion. Candidates 8 and 14 show acceptable performance with moderate conversion, while 9 and 15 have hard-gate violations requiring blocking. All candidates show suboptimal conversion (<0.85) due to insufficient residence time. Candidate 12 has mixing issues and candidate 16 exceeds length limits.

kinetics_overall: Candidates 2 and 3 have hard gates for insufficient conversion. Candidates 1 and 4 are viable but need longer residence times for optimal kinetics. Candidates 5 and 7 show acceptable performance with good conversions, while 13 exceeds length limits and 6 has severe mixing and conversion issues. Candidates 8 and 14 show adequate conversion (~63%) with manageable reactor lengths, while candidates 9 and 15 suffer from insufficient conversion (~44%) and hard gate violations. All candidates show undersized residence times for kinetics with conversions well below target. Candidate 12 has dual mixing failures while candidate 16 exceeds bench length limits.

fluidics_overall: Candidates 2 and 3 have hard gate failures requiring blocking. Candidates 1 and 4 are viable with minor diameter adjustments needed. Mixed batch with hard-gated failures and viable options requiring optimization. Candidates 8 and 14 show acceptable performance with good mixing and conversion above minimum thresholds. Candidates 9 and 15 have hard gate violations requiring blocking. All candidates show suboptimal conversion rates below 0.85 target. Candidates 12 and 16 have hard gate violations requiring blocking or significant revision.

safety_overall: Cycloaddition reaction at 120°C with low pressure drops. Candidates 2 and 3 have hard gate failures requiring blocking. Mixed batch with one blocked candidate due to hard gates, others show acceptable safety profiles with minor kinetic limitations. Candidates 8 and 14 are acceptable with minor kinetic warnings, while candidates 9 and 15 have hard gate failures requiring revision. All candidates show adequate pressure safety with low delta_P values well below pump limits. Candidates 12 and 16 have hard gate violations requiring revision.
